        10 Best Assisted Living Facilities in Fruitland Park, FL

        Answer a few questions to get personalized results
        Who are you searching for?
        How quickly do you need to find an option?
        Is dementia or a hospital/rehab stay prompting your search?
        Would you estimate the monthly budget above or below $1,500?
        Thanks, {{firstName}}
        One of our expert Senior Living Advisors will be reaching out to support your search.
        Your personalized listings are below.
        See my listings

        • Home
        • Senior Living
        • Assisted Living
        • Assisted Living in FL
        • Assisted Living in Lake County
        • Assisted Living in Fruitland Park

        Assisted living costs in Fruitland Park average about $4,486 per month. To find the best assisted living options for your needs and budget, browse through 36 communities in Fruitland Park. Our detailed directory has 646 reviews, photos, and lists of available services, amenities, and activities. You may also consider nearby communities such as The Villages, Lady Lake and Eustis.

        Assisted living is ideal for seniors who need help with activities of daily living, such as bathing and eating, and prefer a social setting to pursue their interests. These communities offer a variety of dining options, as well as housekeeping services to eliminate daily stresses. 

        Fruitland Park Assisted Living Facilities | 646 Reviews

        Cost of assisted living in Fruitland Park, FL

        The average cost of senior living in Fruitland Park is $4,486 per month. Cheaper nearby regions include Inverness Highlands South, FL with an average of $4,161 per month.

        Ways to pay for Assisted Living in Fruitland Park, FL

        Paying for assisted living may seem daunting, but knowing all your options can be empowering. Read about the many private and public payment options that families use to pay for assisted living in Fruitland Park.

        What families are saying about assisted living in Fruitland Park

        Recent reviews for assisted living in Fruitland Park

        Elan Buena Vista in The Villages, FL

        5.0
        We chose this community because out of the ones that we looked into for my friend, this one was the best. The room sizes are good and spacious. I have eaten here and the food is very good, they have a lot of variety. I would recommend Elan Buena Vista to a friend or family member.

        Camelot Chateau Assisted Living LLC in Ocala, FL

        5.0
        Before I moved here, I received a welcoming call from a staff members and that friendly spirit of interest of staff continues offering a variety of food and activities. the facility is very organized and well managed

        Hampton Manor at Deerwood in Ocala, FL

        4.5
        We moved my aunt into HMD about 1 l/2 years ago. Of course at age 95 l/2 she was not happy the first few months. All of the staff made her feel at home and helped her work through the move and new chapter in her life. She loved sitting out side on the front porch and in the front area near ...

At Buffalo Crossings Assisted Living Community, for example, mom has made many new friends and has done a ton of activities, contributing to her happiness and enjo ...
        Read more
        Accessibility and convenient location. Some reviews highlight the importance of accessibility and convenient location for their loved ones, allowing them to maintain independence and stay connected to their community. For example, at Sumter Senior Living, the location is great and the people are all friendly and helpful.

        Fruitland Park review score based on 136 family reviews

        8.0
        Review score32 facilities136 reviewsWrite a review
        This proprietary review score is based on 136 reviews of 32 Fruitland Park assisted living communities. All reviews were submitted in the past two years by verified community residents and family members.
        The Fruitland Park review score informs your search by letting you see at a glance how assisted living residents and family members rate assisted living in your area. Compare review scores in multiple locations to understand how overall satisfaction rates differ from city to city. Based on recent reviews, the maximum possible score is 10.Methodology: How we calculate our city review scores
        How we score Fruitland Park assisted livingClose
        The Fruitland Park review score is an average of all the community review scores in the area.Community review scores are based on recent reviews — from the past 24 months — because we know families need current information when choosing senior care. Communities with many recent, positive reviews receive a high review score, while communities with few current reviews receive a lower score. Communities with no recent reviews will not have a review score, even if older reviews are positive. The maximum A Place for Mom review score a community can receive is 10 points.

        State regulations for assisted living in Fruitland Park

        Safety is a primary concern when seniors and their families look for assisted living. Each state has its own laws and inspection processes to help ensure seniors reside in a safe environment and receive quality care. Learning about Florida assisted living regulations will help you understand how assisted living communities in Fruitland Park protect seniors.
